zh.lifeSummary: Henry de Edmundiston是Henricus de Edmundiston of that Ilk的兒子，於1299年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾坎布茲森。他於1325年之前與Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1359年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry de Edmundiston是Henricus de Edmundiston of that Ilk的儿子，于1299年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾坎布茲森。他于1325年之前与Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1359年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry de Edmundiston was born in 1299, in Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Henricus de Edmundiston of that Ilk. He married Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston before 1325, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1359, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry d’Edmundiston est né en 1299, à Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Henricus d’Edmundiston of that Ilk. Il a épousé Mrs Henry Eanric d’Edmundiston avant 1325, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1359, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Henry de Edmundiston wurde 1299 in Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Henricus de Edmundiston of that Ilk geboren. Er hat vor 1325 in Schottland, United Kingdom Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1359 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Henry de Edmundiston è nato il nel 1299 nel Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di Henricus de Edmundiston of that Ilk. Lui sposato Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston prima del 1325, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1359, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Edmundistonは1299年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカンブスネサンでHenricus de Edmundiston of that Ilkの息子として生まれた。1325年以前にイギリススコットランドでMrs Henry Eanric de Edmundistonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1359年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Edmundiston(은)는 1299년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 캄버스네스아에서 Henricus de Edmundiston of that Ilk의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1325년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1359년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry de Edmundiston nasceu em 1299, em Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Henricus de Edmundiston of that Ilk. Ele casou-se com Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston antes 1325, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1359, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry de Edmundiston родился в 1299 г. в местности камбуснетань, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Henricus de Edmundiston of that Ilk. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston перед 1325 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1359 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Henry de Edmundiston nació en 1299, en Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hijo de Henricus de Edmundiston of that Ilk. Se casó con Mrs Henry Eanric de Edmundiston antes de 1325, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1359, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
